examples: Her patience with our failings and fickleness and her willingness to give us a second chance are a daily lesson in gratitude.
Fickleness is also blamed for some of the breakups.
His story became a parable for the fickleness of art and life.
As for professional fickleness: there seems to be a bad kind and a good kind.
Winchester notes a key difficulty in predicting market movements, especially this year: the fickleness of investor confidence.
